rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 9, 2012, line 5. Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus. 1) and 2) deny. Moving party failed to sustain burden showing abuse of discretion in denying appeal and decision by Hearing Officer. = (501/REQ)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 9, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ROBERT MURPHY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective. Court concurs with moving party's basis. = (501/REQ)
